message:
feat: add CLI commands for sync, graph, feedback, and experiments

Major feature addition introducing new CLI commands and supporting
infrastructure for skill synchronization, graph analysis, user feedback,
and A/B experiments.

New CLI Commands:
- sync: Synchronize skills across machines with conflict detection
- remote: Manage sync remotes (add, remove, list, set-url)
- machine: Show or update local machine identity for sync
- conflicts: View and resolve sync conflicts
- graph: Skill graph analysis with bv (beads) integration
- install: Install skills from bundles (complements 'bundle' command)
- feedback: Record and list user feedback on skills
- outcome: Record skill usage outcomes (success/failure)
- experiment: Manage A/B experiments on skills
- migrate: Migrate skills to latest spec format
- shell: Interactive shell with skill-aware completions

New Modules:
- src/sync/: Multi-machine synchronization engine
  - config.rs: Sync configuration and remote management
  - engine.rs: Core sync logic with three-way merge
  - machine.rs: Machine identity management
  - state.rs: Sync state tracking
- src/graph/: Skill graph analysis
  - bv.rs: Integration with bv (beads) issue tracker
  - skills.rs: Skill dependency graph operations
- src/core/spec_migration.rs: Spec format migration utilities

Database Extensions (sqlite.rs):
- Add QuarantineReview, SkillFeedbackRecord, ExperimentRecord types
- Add record_skill_outcome() for tracking usage results
- Add record_skill_feedback() and list_skill_feedback() for user feedback
- Add create_skill_experiment() and list_skill_experiments() for A/B tests
- Improve error handling in list_incomplete_transactions():
  - Return error on unknown transaction phase instead of defaulting
  - Propagate date parse errors instead of silently using current time

Migration:
- migrations/008_add_skill_feedback.sql: Schema for feedback tracking

Tests:
- tests/integration/migration_tests.rs: Spec migration tests
- tests/integration/more_cli_tests.rs: Additional CLI coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+-- Add skill feedback tracking
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS skill_feedback (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    skill_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES skills(id),
+    feedback_type TEXT NOT NULL,
+    rating INTEGER,
+    comment TEXT,
+    created_at TEXT NOT NULL
+);
+
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_skill_feedback_skill ON skill_feedback(skill_id);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_skill_feedback_created ON skill_feedback(created_at);

@@ -95,6 +95,21 @@ pub enum Commands {
     /// Manage skill bundles
     Bundle(commands::bundle::BundleArgs),
 
+    /// Synchronize skills across machines
+    Sync(commands::sync::SyncArgs),
+
+    /// Manage sync remotes
+    Remote(commands::remote::RemoteArgs),
+
+    /// Show or update machine identity
+    Machine(commands::machine::MachineArgs),
+
+    /// Skill graph analysis (bv integration)
+    Graph(commands::graph::GraphArgs),
+
+    /// Manage sync conflicts
+    Conflicts(commands::conflicts::ConflictsArgs),
+
     /// Migrate skills to latest spec format
     Migrate(commands::migrate::MigrateArgs),
